message:
✨ Add 'None' AI agent option with 'Live' status indicator (#1605)

Users working with sensitive data can now pause AI by selecting 'None'
in the agent dropdown. The agent stays connected for live cluster data
but no AI processing occurs. Status pill shows cyan 'Live' instead of
green 'AI' to clearly indicate the mode.

- Add 'None' option at top of AgentSelector dropdown with ShieldOff icon
- Cyan/teal 'Live' pill in navbar when agent connected but AI is off
- Warning banner in mission sidebar when AI is paused
- Add isAIDisabled helper to MissionContext for future gating
- Skip WebSocket select_agent message for 'none' selection
- Add i18n keys across all 9 locales

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

     "degradedTitle_one": "Local Agent degraded ({{count}} error)",
     "degradedTitle_other": "Local Agent degraded ({{count}} errors)",
     "aiLabel": "AI",
+    "liveLabel": "Live",
+    "liveMode": "Live mode — agent connected, AI disabled",
+    "noneAgent": "None",
+    "noneAgentDesc": "Agent data only — no AI processing",
+    "aiPausedBanner": "AI is paused — select an agent to enable AI features",
     "backendUnavailable": "Backend API unavailable",
     "localAgentConnected": "Local Agent connected",
     "connecting": "Connecting to agent...",
